conflicts.finding: Generated-media retention is described as three days in Getting Started and 24 hours in Overview/Task Status.
conflicts.decision: Download immediately and use 24 hours only as a safe operational floor without fabricating expiry metadata.

conflicts.finding: Upload retention varies by method and media type.
conflicts.decision: Persist the returned expires_at value; do not assume a global upload lifetime.

conflicts.finding: Status and balance describe charge-on-finish while model prose also describes pre-deduction/refunds.
conflicts.decision: Treat balance as timestamped and persist authoritative terminal credits_amount.

conflicts.finding: The generic submit input permits fields and combinations narrowed by model pages.
conflicts.decision: Model-specific Markdown/JSON and reviewed conditional adapters take precedence.

conflicts.finding: The paired Task Status JSON URL currently returns 404; historical JSON omitted audio while Markdown includes it.
conflicts.decision: Preserve forward-compatible raw file types and index only image/video in the initial library.

conflicts.finding: Some Poyo schemas default enable_safety_checker to true.
conflicts.decision: Poyo Local Studio explicitly sends false by default for supported workflows and preserves user opt-in.

conflicts.finding: The public pricing catalogue is rendered HTML and not a pricing-estimate API contract.
conflicts.decision: Track canonical visible-text drift but do not claim deterministic request cost estimates.
